seoTitle: Wellcamp vs Wellesley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wellcamp and Wellesley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wellcamp and Wellesley.
heading: Wellcamp vs Wellesley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wellcamp, Queensland and Wellesley, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wellcamp has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Wellesley (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wellcamp or Wellesley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wellcamp has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Wellesley scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wellcamp scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Wellesley scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wellcamp or Wellesley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wellcamp has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
